race.description: Triple M Country Boosted Showcase 3yo & Up Mdn Hcp
race.comment: HEAD KAHUNA (2) has registered four minor placings from all four runs this campaign and finds a weaker race today. Stalked the good tempo with a game third over 1000m at Scone. Gets a similar set-up here and is ready to win. ZUBBA STORM (1) is a three-year-old Toronado gelding now in the Mack Griffith barn. Made a little ground late when fourth at Sandown-Hillside on January 28. No recent trial form but looks well placed from the draw. NUCLEAIRE (11) came out fast on resumption with a tidy third over 1000m at Parkes. Clearly come back well and can overcome the awkward gate. MEDIA SPIN (3) resumes. Slow into stride on debut with a slashing third from last on the turn over 1000m at Orange last January. One of the key contenders.
